title: Legends: Superheroes Unlimited
description: The Superheroes pack for Legends Mod 1.18.2 &  1.20.1 Forge Minecraft.
body:
![Legends Superheroes Unlimited](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f7348bfc91b50423b6af1a1ea502f79d13f1300.png)

Ever wanted to build your own Iron Man Suit while flying around on your Green Goblin Glider battling Thanos in Minecraft?! Or traverse across the galaxy as a Green Lantern, hunting down the sinister six? The Legends Superheroes Pack allows you to suit up as your favorite heroes and villains to fight in the battle against good and evil.

![Superheroes Unlimited is back!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca9bd8721e6d65efb65965e911a2fd3fb7bf4b05.png)

# 
# Requirements
Download: [Legends Core Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/legends-mod-(core)/versions)

Download: [Azurelib Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib/version/A0cHpbIs)

(For 1.18.2 Legends Mod) Download: [Azurelib 3.0.14 Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib/version/Wn4KDLDB)

##  Want to play with others? Join the official Legends Mod server!

IP: Coming Soon!
